title: Add VM bootstrap and backup operations scripts
goal: Make the first GCP VM setup and backup operations repeatable instead of relying on manual command copying.
scope: Add a Debian VM bootstrap script for Docker, deploy user, and staging/production working copies.
Add a Cloud Storage backup upload helper.
Add a cron installation helper for scheduled production backups.
Update deployment documentation to use the operational scripts.
verification: Documentation points to the new bootstrap and backup scripts.
No application runtime behavior changes are required.
completed_notes: Added deploy/vm/bootstrap-debian.sh for day-0 VM setup.
Added deploy/compose/backup-to-gcs.sh for off-VM backup uploads.
Added deploy/vm/install-backup-cron.sh for scheduled backup installation.
Updated GCP and Compose deployment docs.
